summary: Iter 63 verified: Cross-firm multi-select for Reports Hub + Bulk Employee Correction. Backend: wrote /app/backend/tests/test_iter63_cross_firm.py with 15 pytest tests covering employees / salary-runs / compliance-salary-runs / bonus-runs cross-firm queries + POST /admin/employees/bulk-correction with company_ids[]. ALL 15/15 PASS. Legacy singular company_id=X still works for all 4 GETs and the POST. company_admin correctly IGNORES company_ids[] (scoped to own firm — verified by logging in as admin.skscoltd@sksharma.local and calling /admin/employees with two company_ids: only own firm's employees returned). Employee role → 403 on /admin/employees and /admin/employees/bulk-correction (verified). Bulk-correction correctly applied 2 corrections across 2 firms in dry_run mode, skipped user_ids outside the requested company_ids scope (skipped_count=1), and rejected requests with neither company_id nor company_ids (HTTP 400). Frontend visual verification (super_admin, desktop 1440x900): /reports — 'Multi-firm mode (cross-firm export)' checkbox present (testID=rep-cross-firm-toggle), toggling ON swaps the single-select <select> for the MultiCompanyPicker (testID=rep-multi-picker); the picker opens with all 39 firms, has a working search input, Select-all/Clear/Use-header-firm pill actions, and Done button. /bulk-employee-correction — 'Multi-firm mode (edit across firms)' toggle present (testID=bc-cross-firm-toggle), reveals bc-multi-picker on ON, employees table shows a 'FIRM' column header, employee rows include firm name column values, Preview + Apply buttons render.

react_native_issues.issue: `wrapRef` is attached to an RN <View> and the outside-click handler at /app/frontend/src/components/MultiCompanyPicker.tsx:50-62 does `wrapRef.current as unknown as HTMLElement` then calls `el.contains(e.target)`. On react-native-web, refs on <View> sometimes surface the DOM node and sometimes an RN wrapper; if the cast returns a non-HTMLElement, `.contains()` will not work and inside-panel clicks may be treated as outside, prematurely closing the picker. Recommend using an explicit web-only DOM ref (e.g., a wrapper <div> via Platform check or ReactDOM.findDOMNode fallback) OR guard with `typeof el.contains === 'function'`. This did not block user-facing testing on Iter 62 (compliance-salary-run) but may explain some flakiness in automated Playwright clicks on picker rows.

action_items: OPTIONAL: harden MultiCompanyPicker outside-click handler to be resilient when wrapRef.current is not a DOM Element on rn-web (guard with typeof el.contains === 'function'). Non-blocking for iter 63.

Main agent can self-verify the 'Download all CSVs' button + BC cross-firm employee list by manually clicking 2 firm rows in the picker — the wire is confirmed in code (reports.tsx:268 gates bulk-dl on crossFirmMode && crossFirmSet.size>1 && salary/compliance tabs) and the backend supports it (all 4 GETs accept repeated ?company_ids=).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py list_employees / list_salary_runs / list_compliance_salary_runs / list_bonus_runs all correctly branch: company_admin → own firm only; else company_ids[] → {$in: cleaned}; else company_id → equality. Filter is applied BEFORE any month/FY filter so both compose correctly. ✓

iter60_features.py bulk_employee_correction: allowed_cids union of payload.company_id + payload.company_ids is deduped by the `not in` guard; each employee lookup includes {company_id: {$in: allowed_cids}} to scope, and the group cascade at line 775-790 uses the row's own company_id (existing.get('company_id')) — group members can NEVER leak into another firm's group even in cross-firm mode. ✓

compliance-salary-runs GET requires compliance_salary:read permission — super_admin passes, so cross-firm works for the intended user. A company_admin without the permission will still 403 (Iter 62 behavior unchanged). ✓

MultiCompanyPicker.tsx uses SelectedCompanyContext to load companies (no extra API), returns totalMatches/selectedInFilter correctly, and the Select-all pill respects the current search filter — good. ✓

reports.tsx line 268 gates the bulk-dl button on `crossFirmMode && crossFirmSet.size > 1 && (tab==='salary'||tab==='compliance')` — bonus tab correctly excluded (verified via Playwright: bulk-dl absent on bonus tab).
bulk-employee-correction.tsx line 250 sends body.company_ids only when crossFirmSet has entries — otherwise falls back to legacy company_id, matching backend semantics. ✓

success_rate.frontend: 100% for the toggle/picker/column-header visual checks; 'Download all CSVs' button and 2-firm employee list not visually verified due to test-side selector flakiness on picker rows, but backend + wiring code both confirm the flow works.

seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. All bulk-correction tests use dry_run=True so no employee mutations. Session tokens are the only artifacts (natural OTP flow expiration).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 63 cross-firm GETs accept repeated `?company_ids=<id>&company_ids=<id>` (FastAPI Query(List[str])). Bulk-correction POST body accepts either {company_id: X} OR {company_ids: [X, Y]} OR both (union). Frontend token key on web is 'llc_session_token' in localStorage. To login as super_admin from within Playwright, use same-origin fetch via page.evaluate — external urllib requests to /api/auth/otp/* got 403 from the emergent WAF but the same fetch from within the loaded page works. MultiCompanyPicker rows do not have per-firm testIDs — to select specific firms in tests, use page.get_by_text(firm_name, exact=True). Note that the outside-click handler in MultiCompanyPicker.tsx may make inside-panel clicks flaky on rn-web (see react_native_issues above).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in iter 63 diff. The one non-blocking observation is a potential fragility in MultiCompanyPicker's outside-click handler on react-native-web (see react_native_issues).
